isolation.qemuCleanup: pkill -f qemu-system-aarch64 before and after each test

assertions.title: Boot serial output shows GICv3 identification

steps.action: Run smoke.sh which boots QEMU with gic-version=3

steps.observed: Only match: '⚡ interrupts - gic v3 (dtb)'. Zero 'gic v2' references.

evidence.grepOutput: grep -i gic /tmp/qemu-serial.log returned only: '⚡ interrupts - gic v3 (dtb)'

evidence.testOutput: test result: ok. 1738 total passed across all test binaries. Exit code 0.

assertions.title: Kernel builds cleanly with cargo build --release

steps.observed: Exit code 0. One warning: method `send_ipi` is never used (dead_code). No errors.

evidence.buildOutput: Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 0.04s. 1 warning (send_ipi unused). Exit code 0.

assertions.title: QEMU boots on GICv3 — all 4 cores, timer, init spawns processes

steps.expected: All 4 cores online, timer fires, init spawns processes, smoke test passes
steps.observed: All 17 smoke checks passed. Serial shows: core 1/2/3 online, timer - 250hz, init spawns drivers (blk), fuzz test passes, stress test starts. Smoke test exited 0.

evidence.smokeOutput: Smoke test passed. 17/17 checks OK: booting, memory, heap, dtb, devices, frames, interrupts, scheduler, virtio, sector 0, processes, smp, core 1/2/3 online, timer, booted.

assertions.title: Display pipeline works after migration — keystrokes appear on framebuffer

steps.expected: Integration test passes, display pipeline running
steps.observed: Integration test PASSED. Serial shows full pipeline: GPU ready (1280x800), compositor starting, core starting, text-editor starting, 'display pipeline running'. All 17 integration checks OK.

evidence.integrationOutput: Integration test PASSED. Full device pipeline (GPU + keyboard + blk + 9p) booted. Display 1280x800, double framebuffer, scene graph allocated, render loop entered.

assertions.title: 180s stress test passes on GICv3 — no panics, no crashes

steps.expected: Stress test exits 0, no panics or crashes within 180s timeout
steps.observed: ALL PASS after 40s. Fuzz test PASS (36 phases). Stress test PASS. Exit code 0. No panics, no crashes.

evidence.stressOutput: ALL PASS after 40s. Summary: fuzz test PASS (36 phases), stress test PASS. Exit code 0.

assertions.title: Unit tests verify ICC_SGI1R_EL1 value computed for cores 0-3

steps.action: Search test files for IPI/SGI/affinity tests
steps.expected: Tests exist for ICC_SGI1R_EL1 encoding for cores 0-3
steps.observed: Found in system/test/tests/interrupt_controller.rs: sgi1r_value_core_0, sgi1r_value_core_1, sgi1r_value_core_2, sgi1r_value_core_3, sgi1r_value_all_upper_bits_zero_for_flat_affinity

steps.action: Confirm tests pass as part of full test suite
steps.observed: All 1,738 tests passed including interrupt_controller tests. Exit code 0.

evidence.testFiles: system/test/tests/interrupt_controller.rs — tests at lines 196-231: sgi1r_value_core_0 (target list bit 0), sgi1r_value_core_1 (target list bit 1), sgi1r_value_core_2 (target list bit 2), sgi1r_value_core_3 (target list bit 3), plus upper-bits-zero verification for flat affinity
evidence.testOutput: All passed as part of 1,738 total tests. Exit code 0.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Kernel builds cleanly (1 warning: unused send_ipi). 1,738 unit tests pass (≥1,698 required). QEMU boots with GICv3 on all 4 cores. Display pipeline functional. Stress test passes in 40s. IPI affinity encoding verified for cores 0-3.
